# Your Real Estate Consultant & Broker

> A real estate memoir by Patti Smith, independent broker and managing broker of Patti Smith Real Estate in Georgetown, California, serving El Dorado County since 1992 (CA DRE #01110483).

## About the book
Your Real Estate Consultant & Broker tells the story of how Patti Smith came to real estate, the family brokerage and the people who shaped her, and the relationship-first principles behind the way she represents buyers and sellers across El Dorado County. The book includes a foreword by Joe Stumpf, founder of By Referral Only.

## Chapters
- Little House on the Prairie, with a Phone That Rang on Christmas Eve
- El Jefe and the Man Who Believed in Service Above Self
- Twenty Years of Going Places, and the Surgery That Brought Me Home
- What I Believe After Thirty-Four Years in the Mountains
- What Thirty-Four Years Builds That Cannot Be Taught
- The Principles I Live By
